name: BOLD Survey
subject: Please Reply ↔ Very Quick Survey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY **BOLDPAC** AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
---
_Friends, 2016 is going to be an exciting year._

After years of Republican obstructionism, we have a chance to elect a new Democratic President and Congress that will move our country forward.

So as we start building our winning strategy for the upcoming year, we need to hear from you: **[What is your TOP Democratic priority this Election Year?](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea71f/e60883a/71e119a3/144269d7/2316259907/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Democratic-Priorities?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.03_B1_priorities_X__F1_S3_C1__all&?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")** | **[Preserve the ACA>>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea71f/e60883a/71e119a3/144269d4/2316259907/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/2016-Priorities-ACA?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.03_B1_priorities_X__F1_S3_C1__all&?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")** | **[Gun Violence Prevention>>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea71f/e60883a/71e119a3/144269d5/2316259907/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/2016-Priorities-Guns?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.03_B1_priorities_X__F1_S3_C1__all&?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")**
---|---
**[Defend Women's Rights>>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea71f/e60883a/71e119a3/144269da/2316259907/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/2016-Priorities-WH?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.03_B1_priorities_X__F1_S3_C1__all&?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")** | **[Campaign Finance Reform>>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea71f/e60883a/71e119a3/144269db/2316259907/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Campaign-Finance-Reform?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.03_B1_priorities_X__F1_S3_C1__all&?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")**
**[Protect our Environment>>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea71f/e60883a/71e119a3/144269d8/2316259907/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/2016-Priorities-Environment?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.03_B1_priorities_X__F1_S3_C1__all&?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")** | **[Immigration Reform>>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea71f/e60883a/71e119a3/144269d9/2316259907/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/2016-Priorities-Immigration?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.03_B1_priorities_X__F1_S3_C1__all&?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")**
[**__Something else? Tell us here >>__**](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea71f/e60883a/71e119a3/144269d7/2316259907/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Democratic-Priorities?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.03_B1_priorities_X__F1_S3_C1__all&?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")
Because here's the truth: Republicans aren't sitting idle.

The Koch Brothers are working day and night to elect radical right-wing Republicans to continue their assault on everything from Obamacare to Social Security, gun safety laws, and women's healthcare.

That's why it's imperative that we rally our network of passionate grassroots supporters (that's you!) to be ready to fight back.

**So please, will you let us know your top Democratic priority for the upcoming Election Year?**

[http://go.boldpac.com/2016-Priorities](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea71f/e60883a/71e119a3/144269d7/2316259907/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Democratic-Priorities?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.03_B1_priorities_X__F1_S3_C1__all&?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")

Thank you so much for all of your support,

_BOLD PAC_

|

220 I St. NE, Suite 280
Washington, DC 20002

| PAID FOR BY **BOLDPAC** AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
---

This message was sent to: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea71f/e60883a/71e119a3/144269de/2316259907/VEsHBQ/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/update-your-information")** | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea71f/e60883a/71e119a3/144269de/2316259907/VEsHBA/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/update-your-information").

CHC Bold PAC is the voice for Latinos in American politics. We are committed to representing the values of the Latino community and increasing the diversity of our leadership in the House and Senate.

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. If we're going to elect candidates passionate about issues that impact the Latino community, we need you with us every step of the way.

If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [click here](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea71f/e60883a/71e119a3/144269df/2316259907/VEsHBw/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea71f/e60883a/71e119a3/144269df/2316259907/VEsHBg/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/less-emails") If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts to elect diverse Democrats, please [click here](http://go.boldpac. _From the entire BOLD PAC team, thanks for your support!_

**[DONATE>>](http://go.boldpac. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/boldpacq32015?refcode=footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

name: Rand Paul
subject: URGENT: Obama to unveil new gun control schemes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot

We've been hearing about it for weeks . . .

Now, news reports all state that President
Obama is set to go around Congress and unveil a rash of new gun
control schemes via Executive Order within the next few days.

Patriot, I'm counting on your action right
away to help me put a stop to this madness.

If all possible, will you please agree to a
generous contribution of $45, $30.06, $22, $12 or even $9 to help
create a firestorm of support for my Second Amendment Protection
act?

The fact is, President Obama is not a king.

"Rule by decree" has no place in American
governance.

Yet after American patriots like you stood
with me and stopped President Obama's mad rush to gun control,
I'm afraid President Obama has been doing everything he can to
use Executive Orders to gut our Second Amendment rights.

And after the San Bernardino murders the FBI
is calling "an act of terrorism," the Obama administration has
been feverishly searching for a scapegoat.

I'm afraid they've settled on blaming our
Second Amendment and law-abiding gun owners -- as if cracking
down on gun shows could somehow stop killers who stockpiled
illegal pipe bombs and IEDs!

Imagine if we allow to this to stand.

Imagine if my colleagues in Congress just sit
on their hands while the President of the United States to
undermine and destroy our most precious God-given freedoms with a
stroke of his pen.

What freedoms will be next?

I'm not about to let President Obama get away
with this.
That's why I recently reintroduced the Second
Amendment Protection Act, which would stop ALL federal funds from
being used to implement President Obama's anti-gun Executive
Orders.

I know many of my colleagues will scream to
high heaven once President Obama finally unveils his gun control
schemes.
But talk is cheap. It's time to take action.

With Congress' power of the purse, we can
stop these Executive Orders.

Of course, I'm counting on your action today
to help me get the ball rolling.

Please agree to your most generous
contribution of $45, $30.06, $22, $12 or even $9 right away.

Your support will show my colleagues that the
American people are insisting on ACTION to stop these Executive
Orders.

Please act right away.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Chip in $25 >>

Chip in $50 >>

Chip in $75 >>

Chip in $100 >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Ben Carson
subject: 10 million words. $230 billion. 6 billion hours.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32667464:s16HDzyN2:m:1:876315805:E6E831863FE39467070DEBDE97A6C90B:r)
---

Peter,

10 million words. $230 billion. 6 billion hours.

That's the amount of words in our current tax code as well as how much money and time we as Americans spend every year to prepare our taxes.

**This is absurd, and I'm ready to lead the charge to reform the whole system.**

This morning, I've released my plan to repeal the tax code and replace it with a system that is simple, transparent and fair for all Americans, and returns us to our ideals.

**[To learn more directly from me, please watch the video below. And then, to stand with me as I lead the charge for reform, I ask you to make a secure donation of any amount.
](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32667464:s16HDzyN2:m:1:876315805:E6E831863FE39467070DEBDE97A6C90B:r)**
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32667464:s16HDzyN2:m:1:876315805:E6E831863FE39467070DEBDE97A6C90B:r)
---
Here's the truth -- our current tax code is too complex, it discourages innovation, and it stifles economic growth. The American people are suffering, and it's just not right.

A true 14.9 percent flax tax with no deductions, tax shelters or loopholes will increase our existing anemic 2.2 percent growth rate by an additional 1.6 percent, resulting in nearly 4 percent growth annually.

Over the first ten years of my plan being implemented, I am confident that this surge in growth will increase our real gross domestic product (GDP) by more than 16 percent, lead to the creation of over 5 million new jobs, and help to increase wages by nearly 11 percent.

Peter, it's time for reform. I want **every American** to prosper.

**[That's what my plan will do, and I hope you'll help me make it a reality by donating any amount that you can right now.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32667464:s16HDzyN2:m:1:876315805:E6E831863FE39467070DEBDE97A6C90B:r)**

Thank you, and God Bless America.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32667464:s16HDzyN2:m:1:876315805:E6E831863FE39467070DEBDE97A6C90B:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32667465:s16HDzyN2:m:1:876315805:E6E831863FE39467070DEBDE97A6C90B:r)
---
|
---

name: Doug Stafford
subject: Only one - and it's not Sen. Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot, In the battle to protect Americans' right to privacy from government snooping in Washington, D.C., there's only one candidate for President who has always stood up to the spy state apologists. **[That's Senator Rand Paul.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32673431:Wf96zzyNV:m:1:879035888:B3256054324496F6E4B2A0ADA9344723:r)
** The rest have all fallen short time and again -- including Senator Ted Cruz. As a U.S. Senate candidate, Ted Cruz pledged to oppose reauthorization of the so-called "PATRIOT Act." But once elected, Senator Cruz flip-flopped and voted for it. **Then, making things even worse, he voted to expand government spying with the passage of the so-called "USA Freedom Act."** In defending his support for the so-called "USA Freedom Act," Senator Cruz stated, "the old program covered 20 to 30 percent of phone numbers . . . The new program covers nearly 100%." **That's right, Senator Cruz stated he voted for this scheme because it means MORE spying and MORE collection of innocent Americans' data!** Sold as a "reform" of NSA spying practices, Senator Cruz admitted one reason why the so-called "USA Freedom Act" is anything but. In fact, it still allows government to access Americans' phone records without a warrant. Patriot, when it comes to protecting the U.S. Constitution's Fourth Amendment, Rand Paul is the only candidate who has stood strong against the Big Government bipartisan consensus in Washington, D.C. **Conservatives rightly stand against gun registration because they know registration by government snoops is just the first step toward confiscation.** Likewise, our Founders included the Fourth Amendment in the U.S. Constitution because they understood freedom will not long survive if government bureaucrats get away with spying on every aspect of our lives. Quite frankly, the lives of law-abiding American citizens are none of the government's business. Just as bad, these spying schemes don't even work. As the FBI admitted, NSA data collection has prevented exactly ZERO terrorist attacks! **[Yet, Rand is the ONLY candidate who"gets it."](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32673431:Wf96zzyNV:m:1:879035888:B3256054324496F6E4B2A0ADA9344723:r)
** Rand is the ONLY candidate we can trust to deliver on his promise to restore the Constitution if elected President. He's the ONLY candidate who we can trust to stand up to the Washington machine. [If you Stand With Rand, please agree to your most generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32673431:Wf96zzyNV:m:1:879035888:B3256054324496F6E4B2A0ADA9344723:r) **Your support could not be more critical.** In liberty, Doug Stafford Chief Political Strategist | | **[Chip in $25 >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32673431:Wf96zzyNV:m:1:879035888:B3256054324496F6E4B2A0ADA9344723:r)**

clean_body: Dear Patriot, In the battle to protect Americans' right to privacy from government snooping in Washington, D.C., there's only one candidate for President who has always stood up to the spy state apologists. The rest have all fallen short time and again -- including Senator Ted Cruz. As a U.S. Senate candidate, Ted Cruz pledged to oppose reauthorization of the so-called "PATRIOT Act." But once elected, Senator Cruz flip-flopped and voted for it. Then, making things even worse, he voted to expand government spying with the passage of the so-called "USA Freedom Act." In defending his support for the so-called "USA Freedom Act," Senator Cruz stated, "the old program covered 20 to 30 percent of phone numbers . . . The new program covers nearly 100%." That's right, Senator Cruz stated he voted for this scheme because it means MORE spying and MORE collection of innocent Americans' data! Sold as a "reform" of NSA spying practices, Senator Cruz admitted one reason why the so-called "USA Freedom Act" is anything but. In fact, it still allows government to access Americans' phone records without a warrant. Patriot, when it comes to protecting the U.S. Constitution's Fourth Amendment, Rand Paul is the only candidate who has stood strong against the Big Government bipartisan consensus in Washington, D.C. Conservatives rightly stand against gun registration because they know registration by government snoops is just the first step toward confiscation. Likewise, our Founders included the Fourth Amendment in the U.S. Constitution because they understood freedom will not long survive if government bureaucrats get away with spying on every aspect of our lives. Quite frankly, the lives of law-abiding American citizens are none of the government's business. Just as bad, these spying schemes don't even work. As the FBI admitted, NSA data collection has prevented exactly ZERO terrorist attacks! Rand is the ONLY candidate we can trust to deliver on his promise to restore the Constitution if elected President. He's the ONLY candidate who we can trust to stand up to the Washington machine. Your support could not be more critical. In liberty, Doug Stafford Chief Political Strategist | | Paid for by Rand Paul for President This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 16, 2015. For more information . | mailto:unsub-31564298325-echo3-DAF6D144BF380433124A78FFA29E2E1B@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings **

name: Lauren Fritts
subject: The only grown-up in the 2016 race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Good evening,
Governor Chris Christie kicked off the new year in New Hampshire this morning speaking candidly about the real need for a tested, experienced leader in this race. The anger and frustration felt across this country is real and understandable as President Obama, Hillary Clinton, and too many other elected officials still fail to lead and produce real solutions.

But as he said this morning, **anger alone is not enough.** Our party must unite behind the values and solutions that we know can change the direction of our country. If we don't, Hillary Clinton will win this election in November.
**Governor Chris Christie is ready to unite this party.**
So today, let's unite behind the grown-up in the race, Governor Chris Christie. **[Donate $5, $10, or more to support him and make sure he IS the one to take on Hillary Clinton in November.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45668326:6M02AprSN:m:1:1516426255:8C776ED41706009476B1A52E0D80D557:r)**
You can watch the highlights from his speech below:
1. **[Christie - These Challenging Times Demand A Grown-Up](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45668327:6M02AprSN:m:1:1516426255:8C776ED41706009476B1A52E0D80D557:r)**
2. **[Christie - Anger Alone Is Not A Solution](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45668328:6M02AprSN:m:1:1516426255:8C776ED41706009476B1A52E0D80D557:r)**
3. **[Christie - It Would Be Irresponsible To Split The Party And Give Hillary Clinton The White House](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45668329:6M02AprSN:m:1:1516426255:8C776ED41706009476B1A52E0D80D557:r)**
4. **[Christie - I Am Ready To Unite Our Party](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45668330:6M02AprSN:m:1:1516426255:8C776ED41706009476B1A52E0D80D557:r)**

Thanks,
Lauren Fritts
Digital Director
Chris Christie for President

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45668326:6M02AprSN:m:1:1516426255:8C776ED41706009476B1A52E0D80D557:r)

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: This is what oligarchy looks like
body:
#
[**Your $3 donation to our campaign today is a contribution towards the dismantling of a corrupt system of campaign finance held in place by the Koch brothers and their billionaire friends.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b15/43f17890/46af1911/620fe380/3105452279/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rigged_economy?refcode=em160104donate")
Dear Sisters and Brothers,
_" I like to give on a scale where I can see impact..."_ \- David Koch
Earlier this year, a number of Republicans flew to California to make fundraising pitches to more than four hundred wealthy conservative donors attending a private conference hosted by the Koch brothers.
**It 's worth taking a moment to ask the question, who are the Koch brothers, and what do they want?**
The Koch brothers are the second-wealthiest family in America worth $82 billion. For the Koch brothers, $82 billion in wealth apparently is not good enough. Owning the second-largest private company in America is apparently not good enough. It doesn't appear that they will be satisfied until they are able to control the entire political process.
This issue isn't personal for me. I don't know the Koch brothers, but I do know this. They have advocated for destroying the federal programs that are critical to the financial and personal health of middle class Americans.
Now, most Americans know that the Koch brothers are the primary source of funding for the Tea Party, and that's fine. They know that they favor the outright repeal of the Affordable Care Act, and that's their opinion. It's wrong, but that's fine as well.
But it is not widely known that David Koch once ran for Vice President of the United States of America on the Libertarian Party ticket because he believed Ronald Reagan was much too liberal. And he ran on a platform that included the following:
* "We favor the repeal of the fraudulent, virtually bankrupt and increasingly oppressive Social Security system."
* "We favor the abolition of Medicare and Medicaid programs."
* "We support repeal of all laws which impede the ability of any person to find employment, such as minimum wage laws..."
* "We support the eventual repeal of all taxation."

In 1980, David Koch's presidential ticket received one percent of the vote from the American people. And rightly so. His views were so extreme they were rejected completely out of hand by the American people.
But fast forward almost thirty six years, and one of the most significant realities of modern politics is just how successful David Koch and the like-minded billionaires attending his retreat have been at moving the Republican Party to the extreme right. The ideas above that were dismissed as downright crazy in 1980 are now part of today's mainstream Republican thinking.
**The Koch brothers, and billionaires like them, have bought up the private sector and now they 're buying up the government. It's up to us to put a stop to them, but it will require all of us standing together with one voice on this issue. Add your name if you agree:**
[**Your $3 donation to our campaign today is a contribution towards the dismantling of a corrupt system of campaign finance held in place by the Koch brothers and their billionaire friends.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b15/43f17890/46af1911/620fe380/3105452279/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rigged_economy?refcode=em160104donate")
**[Donate $3](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b15/43f17890/46af1911/620fe380/3105452279/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rigged_economy?refcode=em160104donate")**
Here's the truth: The economic and political systems of this country are stacked against ordinary Americans. The rich get richer and use their wealth to buy elections, and I believe that we cannot change this corrupt system by taking its money. If we're serious about creating jobs, health care for all, climate change, and the needs of our children and the elderly, we must be serious about campaign finance reform.
So far in this election, less than four hundred families have contributed the majority of all the money raised by all the candidates and super PACs combined. According to media reports, one family will spend more money in this election than either the Democratic or Republican Parties.
This is not democracy. This is oligarchy.
Our job is not to think small in this moment. The current system of campaign finance in this country is utterly corrupt. That is one of the reasons I am so proud of how we have funded our campaign -- over 2.5 million contributions from working Americans giving less than $30 at a time. But our campaign is unique.
We must pass a constitutional amendment to overturn Citizens United, and I will not nominate any justice to the Supreme Court who does not make it abundantly clear that she or he will overturn that decision. We need legislation that requires wealthy individuals and corporations who make large campaign contributions to disclose where their money is going. And more importantly, I believe we need to move towards the public funding of elections.
Our vision for American democracy should be a nation in which all people, regardless of their income, can participate in the political process, can run for office without begging for contributions from the wealthy and the powerful.
**Add your name if you agree:**
[**Your $3 donation to our campaign today is a contribution towards the dismantling of a corrupt system of campaign finance held in place by the Koch brothers and their billionaire friends.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b15/43f17890/46af1911/620fe380/3105452279/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rigged_economy?refcode=em160104donate")
Tomorrow afternoon I'll be in New York City to deliver a major speech about our need to create a financial system that works for all Americans, not just the few. I'll be in touch shortly after. I hope that you'll keep an eye on your inbox for my message.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

**[Contribute](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b15/43f17890/46af1911/620fe380/3105452279/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rigged_economy?refcode=em160104donate")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b15/43f17890/46af1911/620fe381/3105452279/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b15/43f17890/46af1911/620fe38e/3105452279/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b15/43f17890/46af1911/620fe38f/3105452279/VEsO/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b15/43f17890/46af1911/620fe38c/3105452279/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

In solidarity, Bernie Sanders "" Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

name: Robby Mook, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Become a 2016 founding donor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
Before Iowa and New Hampshire: | Friend --

Over the weekend, Senator Sanders sent an email arguing that he's the only candidate with a real base of grassroots supporters -- that no one else in the race enjoys the backing of hundreds of thousands of people giving whatever they can afford.

When he says that kind of thing, he's not just dismissing Hillary Clinton -- he's dismissing you and the campaign you've helped build.

For the record, that attack just isn't right. We have more than half a million donors funding this campaign, even more than the Obama campaign had at this point in '08.

But there are millions more people who back this campaign but haven't donated yet -- a critical disadvantage for us against an opponent who's successfully motivated more people to give. **[If you're determined to win this race, chip in $1 right now to become one of the first 2016 donors in your area.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjQzODQ4NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwNDE3MzE2S0&mt=2&rj=NzIwNDE3MzE2S0&rt=0)**

Next month, we'll have the first real tests of our campaign's strength in Iowa and New Hampshire. Whether we win or lose in those key states could change the course of this election. Trust me -- I was there when we lost in 2008, and I have no plans to repeat that experience.

**Make sure that Hillary goes all the way to the general election by chipping in $1 right now:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQzODQ4NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwNDE3MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQzODQ4NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwNDE3MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjQzODQ4NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwNDE3MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQzODQ4NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwNDE3MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjQzODQ4NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwNDE3MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQzODQ4NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwNDE3MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQzODQ4NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwNDE3MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQzODQ4NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwNDE3MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQzODQ4NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwNDE3MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjQzODQ4NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwNDE3MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQzODQ4NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwNDE3MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQzODQ4NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwNDE3MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
clean_body: Before Iowa and New Hampshire: | Friend -- Over the weekend, Senator Sanders sent an email arguing that he's the only candidate with a real base of grassroots supporters -- that no one else in the race enjoys the backing of hundreds of thousands of people giving whatever they can afford. When he says that kind of thing, he's not just dismissing Hillary Clinton -- he's dismissing you and the campaign you've helped build. For the record, that attack just isn't right. We have more than half a million donors funding this campaign, even more than the Obama campaign had at this point in '08. But there are millions more people who back this campaign but haven't donated yet -- a critical disadvantage for us against an opponent who's successfully motivated more people to give. Next month, we'll have the first real tests of our campaign's strength in Iowa and New Hampshire. Whether we win or lose in those key states could change the course of this election. Trust me -- I was there when we lost in 2008, and I have no plans to repeat that experience. Make sure that Hillary goes all the way to the general election by chipping in $1 right now: --- ]() Thanks, Robby Robby Mook Campaign Manager Hillary for America | Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors. Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
